option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value:
#!/bin/bash set -e
echo "=== Open Pull Request ===" echo ""
BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null) || { echo "ERROR: not in a git repo"; exit 1; } echo "Branch: $BRANCH" echo "Repo: catatafishen/agentbridge" echo ""
if [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ]; then echo "ERROR: cannot open a PR from '$BRANCH'" exit 1 fi
read -r -p "PR title: " TITLE if [ -z "$TITLE" ]; then echo "ERROR: title cannot be empty" exit 1 fi
echo "" echo "PR description (optional — end with Ctrl-D, or just press Enter then Ctrl-D for no body):" BODY=$(cat) echo ""
echo "Opening PR..." gh pr create \ --repo catatafishen/agentbridge \ --title "$TITLE" \ --body "${BODY}" \ --base master
